enable_fact_check.hint: Supports quoted text, inline claims, and quoted/inline images on OneBot/AstrBot message chains.

gemini_api_key.hint: Leave empty to use GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable.

fact_check_pre_model.description: Pre-processing model for extracting checkable claims

fact_check_main_models.hint: The first model is tried first. Later models are used on rate-limit/server errors.

fact_check_max_images.description: Max images to inspect per fact-check request

fact_check_max_image_bytes.description: Max bytes per image before it is split into compressed chunks

fact_check_long_image_chunk_height.description: Chunk height used when an oversized long image is split

fact_check_long_image_max_parts.description: Max image chunks generated from one oversized long image

fact_check_long_image_max_width.description: Max width for oversized long-image chunks

fact_check_total_timeout_seconds.description: Total timeout seconds for one fact-check request
fact_check_total_timeout_seconds.hint: Prevents image extraction or Gemini grounding from making the QQ command look unresponsive.

fact_check_max_concurrent.hint: Keep this low to avoid Gemini rate-limit bursts.

fact_check_max_queue.description: Max queued/running fact-check jobs before rejecting new requests

fact_check_cache_ttl_seconds.description: Seconds to reuse the same fact-check reply for identical input

fact_check_followup_ttl_seconds.description: Seconds to keep a fact-check result available for reply follow-ups

fact_check_image_download_timeout_second.description: Timeout seconds for downloading each QQ image

fact_check_pre_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout seconds for claim extraction requests

fact_check_main_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout seconds for the main grounded fact-check request

fact_check_show_failure_reason.description: Reply with a short reason when fact-checking fails
